name: Salata Maroulia (Lettuce Salad)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped dill OR anise seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the lettuce. Save the hearts and tear the remaining leaves into pieces.
2. Cut half of the potatoes into small cubes; cut the rest into round slices. Slice 2 of the eggs; crumble the yolk of the third egg.
3. Mix the lettuce, potato cubes, scallions, and dill or anise seed together in a bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, blend the oil and vinegar and sprinkle over the salad mixture.
5. Let the salad rest for 5 to 10 minutes, then drain off dressing.
6. Add half of the mayonnaise to the salad and mix well.
7. Place the salad on a round platter and cover with the remaining mayonnaise.
8. Surround the salad with egg slices, potato slices, and olives, and sprinkle with parsley and crumbled egg yolk.
9. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
